item.title: AEHR's +25% Spike: Latest AI Hyperscaler Order Improves Outlook
item.description: See what caused small cap semiconductor stock AEHR to soar in February, and what the firm's latest announcement means going forward.

item.title: Oracle’s Emotion-Driven Sell-Off Sets Up Generational Opportunity
item.description: Oracle is on track for a rapid snapback, which could take this market to record highs. Debt concerns persist, but the backlog says it's no problem.

item.title: Amazon Erases a Year of Gains—2 Reasons the Market's Wrong
item.description: Amazon has given up nearly a year's worth of gains, but with its RSI at a multi-year low and unwavering analyst support, the market may have got this ...

item.title: Why Analysts Still See Big Upside in Salesforce After the SaaS Scare
item.description: Salesforce is ready to rebound after overextending in early 2026. The SaaS apocalypse is overblown, setting up a buy-now! opportunity.

item.title: Meta's Platfroms' New Bull: Why Billionaire Bill Ackman Is Buying
item.description: Billionaire and hedge fund manager Bill Ackman just called Meta Platforms "deeply discounted", acquiring a multi-billion dollar stake in the company.
